category_sources: Official GitHub README describes gdu as a fast disk usage analyzer written in Go.
source_facts.description says it is a disk usage analyzer with console interface.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title uses gdu.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, usage flags, modes, configuration, styling, and profiling.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/dundee/gdu, so repo is not redetermined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes modes, flags, configuration, and disk usage analysis.
source_facts.description mentions disk usage analysis and console interface.
